body_txt: A male character suffers a Groin Attack so brutal that everyone else feels it too. Generally this amplifies a moment of Slapstick comedy. Other male characters seem to sympathetically feel it whenever another male character suffers a strike to this most tender area. Classically this will provoke a Sympathetic Wince as a Universal Group Reaction , an acknowledgement that " That's Gotta Hurt ," and loud groans and reflexive cradling of testicles as if the onlookers had been struck themselves. You know it's bad when even the females can feel the male pain. Merely imagining such an injury is agonizing, which is why a Freudian Threat can be frightening. If the one delivering the kicks is a rampaging Action Girl , Kick Chick , Tsundere or all of the above, the reaction may overlap with " Oh, Crap! " as they wonder if they're next. Like Groin Attack , this is rarely applied to females in pain except comedically, but there are a few exceptions. The closest female equivalent is for mothers to wince during scenes of other women giving birth . Contrast Instant Soprano , in which it's the victim of the Groin Attack whose reaction emphasizes its painfulness. Related to the same Primal Fear present in Eye Scream . For examples where pain is genuinely shared across multiple minds, see Synchronization .
